response.justification: Szabo brings 20 years of diverse engineering experience and is currently working on AI infrastructure at re:cinq, which aligns with the role's technical foundation. However, the resume lacks the core requirement: demonstrated expertise in AI with built products or platforms. His background is primarily engineering-focused rather than strategic/director-level innovation, and there's no evidence of advising strategic customers or partners on AI adoption. The recent AI work is a positive signal but insufficient to establish him as a recognized AI expert at the principal level this role demands.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering across multiple domains and full technical stack depth (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure)
Currently contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, showing recent engagement with modern AI tools
Demonstrated ability to share technical knowledge at scale through workshops, open-source projects (GISCollective), and conference talks
concerns: No demonstrated expertise in building AI products or platforms despite recent AI infrastructure work—role specifically requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products'
No Master's or PhD in AI/ML field (preferred qualification); background is in general CS and photography/design
Career trajectory shows technical depth but limited evidence of director-level strategic leadership, innovation strategy, or advising relationships with strategic customers/partners

key_factors.factor: 20 years engineering experience with technical breadth
Recent AI infrastructure work at re:cinq
